title: Gateway nRF52840 build blocked by OSCORE deps
description: After fixing project-LICHEN-hhub, west build -p always -b nrf52840dk/nrf52840 lichen/apps/gateway -d build_gateway_hhub_check gets past the zephyr,uart-pipe failure and then stops in LICHEN OSCORE sources. Exact blockers: lichen/subsys/lichen/oscore/aes_ccm.c and hkdf.c reference undeclared TC_CRYPTO_SUCCESS, and lichen/subsys/lichen/oscore/oscore.c fails to include <zcbor_encode.h>. Decide whether gateway prj.conf/module Kconfig should enable/select the missing TinyCrypt/ZCBOR symbols or whether the OSCORE code should use the Zephyr 3.7 TinyCrypt return constants/includes differently.
close_reason: Fixed OSCORE dependency compile blocker: OSCORE now selects zcbor and TinyCrypt SHA256 HMAC, and AES-CCM/HKDF include tinycrypt/constants.h for TC_CRYPTO_SUCCESS. Validation build compiles OSCORE and now stops later on unrelated nrf52840dk missing lora0 devicetree alias; follow-up project-LICHEN-0low filed.
